titleStmt.title: SII 24.360: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 360. (A.R. No. 155 of 1938-39.) BAZAAR STREET, GŌPURA, INNER WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by purchase from the temple authorities, for 20 chakram by Ūḻiyam Talaiyāri Ekāṇḍār, towards garlands and food offerings. The record is dated in Śaka 1428, Prabhava, Tulā, ba. 3, (Saturday), Rōhiṇī corresponding regularly to A.D. 1507, October 23, Saturday; f.d.t. ·18; ·67.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastic ciṟimaṉ makāmaṇṭalecuvaraṉ metiṉimicurakaṇṭaṉ kaṭṭāricāḷuva taraṇi varākaṉ Irācamicuvarakaṇṭaṉ Irācapakṣicāḷuvaṉ Irācātirācaṉ Irācapa
ramecuvaraṉ kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu koṭātāṉ pūṟuvatēkṣiṇa paccima Uttarac catuccamuttirātipati ciṟivirappiṟatāparāya vacantarāya puca
pelarāya viranaraciṅkatevamakārāyar piṟitivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 8- ku Itiṉmel cellāniṉṟa piṟapava caṅvaṟccarat
tu tulānāyaṟṟu Aparapakkattu tiṟitikaiyum canivāramum peṟṟa rokaṇināḷ tenkarai pāṇṭi kulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkaṉ tiruppati
Ūḻiyam talaiyāri Ekāṇṭāṟkuc ceṉāpatip peruvilai nilavilaip piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttapaṭi perumāḷ ciraṅkanāta tevaṟkku tammuṭaiya kaiṅkari
yamāka tirumālai cātti Aruḷavum teṅkāy Amutu kaṟiyamutu payiṟ ceyyavum viṟṟa nilattukku vilaiyāvatu tirumuṭikkuṟaiyil teṉ kaṇṭattil
Īccaṅkāṭṭu kuṭi mukuntayar Ayyaṉ toppukku meṟku Aṇiyaraṅkaṉ vāykkālukkum nañceyukuṭi Oṉṟu viṭṭu vaṭakku
tirutācarāma ciyyaṅkār toppukku kiḻakku kantāṭai Irāmacantiṟayaṅkār toppukku teṟku Āka Iṉṉāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭa
viṭṭa Irācavipāṭaṉāl naṉcey kuḻi 2 100 Intakkuḻi Irunūṟṟukkum vilaiyāka niṉṟayamRead ‘nirṇayam’paṇṇiṉa cakkaram U 2 10 Intap
paṇam Irupatum kiṟipaṇṭārattile celuttivittukoṇṭapaṭi Āle Intat tiruttoppil Uṇṭāṉa kaṟiyamutukku
p paṭittaram Uḷḷatu ciṟiyapaṇṭārattile mutal Iṭak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu ceṉāpatipperuvilai nilavilaip piṟamāṇam
paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ayyankārayyaṉ Ūḻiyam talaiyāri Ekāṇṭāṟku ciraṅka nārāyaṇatātacciyaru Aṉaittuk kotti
l tāṉikarumom Ittiruppati cāttāta civayiṭṭiṇavar Ārāvamutu cāraṅkapāṇi Intapaṭi ceytu koṇṭu vara kaṟpittapaṭi
ālē cattiṟātityavaraiyum Aṉupavittu varakkaṭavatākavum Ivai ciraṅkanārāyaṇa nācacciyyarum vā ci Uttamanampi Eḻuttu
Next line built in by the road paiyamāka kaṭṭivicca maṇṭapattil Eṟiyaruḷi Amutu ceyyiṟa paṭiyiṉāle Intap poliyūṭṭu Ācantapraṟata stāpitamāka putra pavu(t)tra pāramparai Āka cantirātittavaraiyum naṭak Inta cilācātaṉam Eḻutiṉamaikku kovil kaṇakku śrīraṅganārāyaṇappiriyaṉ Eḻuttu . dāṉapālanayot ma śreyonupālanam . dānāt svarggamavāpnoti pālanāda cyutampatam .
Digital edition of SII 24.360 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
